## Fillings.PinchScaler class

Scaler for pinch measurements - always returns the original amount. Pinch is an imprecise measurement that doesn't scale linearly.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class PinchScaler implements IUnitScaler 
```
**Implements:** [IUnitScaler](./ts-chocolate.fillings.iunitscaler.md)
